name: Xygeni — Software Supply Chain Security (SSCS / ASPM)
description: Imports findings and supply-chain posture from Xygeni (SSCS/ASPM: SAST, SCA/SBOM, secrets, IaC, container, malicious-package/malware detection, CI/CD misconfiguration, and build/pipeline SLSA provenance). Each Xygeni project becomes a project context; SCA component vulnerabilities become vulnerabilities on the project asset (CVE-linked where present), and secrets / IaC / SAST / malicious-package issues become findings. Config (worker environment variables): XYGENI_API_URL (default https://api.xygeni.io), XYGENI_API_TOKEN. Offline: pass `file` = a Xygeni export JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved Xygeni export JSON to parse instead of the live API
